title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Delhivery Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Delhivery Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Digital Marketing Manager looking for your next big career move? Delhivery Ventures Solutions in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Delhivery Ventures Solutions:
Delhivery Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery Ventures Solutions!
